title: crassula natans subsp. filiformis
intro: Crassula natans subsp. filiformis, also known as the floating jade plant, is a succulent plant that belongs to the family Crassulaceae and is native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Crassula natans subsp. filiformis include its ability to reduce fever, soothe wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues. Crassula natans subsp. filiformis is typically prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, and it can also be used as a topical application to treat skin conditions.
